tweet.text:
RT @dallasmavs: Stood on business all season 😤
@PJWashington // #MFFL https://t.co/smCvEHi3Gj
RT @NBA: Join us in wishing @PJWashington of the @DallasMavs a HAPPY 26th BIRTHDAY! #NBABDAY https://t.co/Ec9MRMw2h2

RT @ESPNNBA: Chills.
Clutch: The NBA Playoffs presented by NBA2K25 on PS5 | Now on ESPN 🔥 https://t.co/b487fiiD1t
